title: Japanese Braised Leek and Garlicky Rice
description: A flavorful and savory Japanese-inspired dish featuring tender leeks and garlicky rice.
instructions: Heat the garlicky oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced leek and cook for 5 minutes, until tender.
Add the light soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the mediterranean rice and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the water and braised dashi broth, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
